comment: v1.4 Sprint 5 voice catalogue, extended in Sprint 12. 16 prompt-engineered personas; 8 indic_* entries point at IndicF5 (Sprint 12), the 2 indic_kn_* entries stay on Parler until Sprint 13 swaps them to NeMo Kannada. The catalogue grows by adding new personas — entries are append-only so saved SongDocuments referencing an older voice_id keep resolving. Preview WAVs live in the public `voice-samples` Supabase Storage bucket under `samples/<voice_id>.wav`; the operator regenerates them with `services/vocal-synth/scripts/render_voice_previews.py` when the prompt changes.

voices.label: Hindi · Broadcast male
voices.prompt: An adult Indian-Hindi male voice with broadcast clarity, mid-baritone register, neutral accent, even pacing, studio-quality dry recording.

voices.label: Hindi · Lyrical female
voices.prompt: An adult Indian-Hindi female voice with a warm, lyrical timbre, light vibrato, slightly intimate microphone proximity, suited to ballads.

voices.label: Kannada · Warm storyteller
voices.prompt: An adult Kannada male voice with a warm storyteller cadence, soft consonants, mid register, room ambience suggesting an evening recital.

voices.label: Kannada · Bhajan female
voices.prompt: An adult Kannada female voice trained in bhajan/bhavageete singing, sustained vowels, light upward melisma, mid-bright timbre.

voices.label: Tamil · Classical-paired male
voices.prompt: An adult Tamil male voice that pairs well with nadaswaram and thavil, declamatory devotional style, full chest resonance, slightly nasal projection.

voices.label: Tamil · Bhakti female
voices.prompt: An adult Tamil female voice for bhakti/devotional repertoire, clear diction, light reverb suggesting a temple hall, soft attack.

voices.label: Telugu · Neutral male
voices.prompt: An adult Telugu male voice, neutral accent, even-tempered, studio-quality dry recording, mid register.

voices.label: Telugu · Neutral female
voices.prompt: An adult Telugu female voice, neutral accent, even-tempered, studio-quality dry recording, mid-bright register.

voices.label: Bengali · Rabindrasangeet male
voices.prompt: An adult Bengali male voice in the Rabindrasangeet tradition, deliberate vibrato, sustained vowels, light tanpura-room ambience.

voices.label: Bengali · Neutral female
voices.prompt: An adult Bengali female voice, neutral accent, even pacing, studio-quality dry recording.

voices.label: English (IN) · Announcer male
voices.prompt: An adult Indian-English male voice with announcer authority, mid-baritone, crisp consonants, slight upward inflection on phrase ends.

voices.label: English (IN) · Radio jockey female
voices.prompt: An adult Indian-English female radio-jockey voice, conversational warmth, slight smile audible in the timbre, mid-bright register.

voices.label: Sanskrit · Sustained chant
voices.prompt: An adult Sanskrit chant voice, slow and sustained, ambiguous gender, dry hall reverb suggesting a meditation space, long vowels.

voices.label: Devotional · Bright chant
voices.prompt: An adult Hindi devotional chant voice, bright timbre, ambiguous gender, light bell harmonics in the room ambience, mid-fast pacing.

voices.label: Cinematic · Baritone narrator
voices.prompt: An adult English male warm-narrator voice in a cinematic baritone, slow pacing, deep chest resonance, light room reverb, intimate microphone proximity.

voices.label: Cinematic · Airy alto
voices.prompt: An adult English female airy-alto voice, breathy at the attack, mid register, light hall reverb, soulful expressive phrasing.
